thought.text: It seems I need to get an API key first before using the OpenWeatherMap API. Let me try a different approach by searching for the current temperature in Burbank, IL on a weather website.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "curl -s \"https://wttr.in/Burbank_IL\" | grep -A 1 \"Temp:\"", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Get current temperature using wttr.in API"}

summary: Get current temperature using wttr.in API
